title: FermatMind
description: FermatMind provides clear, reusable assessment results for personality, ability, and career direction.

hero.title: Understand yourself before the next step.
hero.subhead: Start with a clear, reusable assessment result for personality, ability, and career direction.
hero.body: Begin with the most-used entry points, then use the result for learning, collaboration, and career judgment.

quickStart.title: Start from one clear question.
quickStart.body: Six common entry points stay visible. Question-count and version choices move to each test page.

items.title: MBTI Personality Test
items.description: Understand your type preference and decision style quickly.
items.label: Start test

items.title: Big Five Personality Test
items.description: Read your stable traits across five dimensions.
items.label: Start test

items.title: Enneagram Test
items.description: Understand behavior patterns through motivation and stress response.
items.label: Start test

items.title: Holland Career Interest Test
items.description: Start from interest structure and career direction.
items.label: Start test

items.title: IQ Test
items.description: Get a quick baseline for cognitive ability.
items.label: Start test

items.title: Depression and Anxiety Assessment
items.description: Review depression and anxiety dimensions with a fuller recent-state reference.
items.label: Start test

families.title: Keep exploring without delaying the start.
families.body: Secondary paths stay lightweight instead of taking over the homepage.

items.title: All assessments
items.description: See every available assessment entry.

items.title: Career exploration
items.description: Put results back into career direction.

items.title: Fun experiments
items.description: SBTI and lightweight experiments live here.

items.title: Data method
items.description: Read method, boundary, and privacy notes.

results.title: What you get back is more than a label.
results.body: The result brings type, differences, and next-step suggestions onto one page so you can keep judging clearly.

trust.title: Start first, go deeper when needed.
trust.body: The homepage keeps only essential trust information. Method and privacy details are one step away.

items.title: Free and reliable
items.summary: Core assessments are built around self-knowledge, career judgment, and capability growth.

items.title: We take your privacy seriously.
items.summary: Start without an account, then decide whether to save results or go deeper.

items.title: Many users take multiple tests
items.summary: Personality, ability, and state entries help you review change over time.

secondaryExplore.title: Use these only when you need a different path.

items.description: Complete assessment entry

header.testsBody: Personality, ability, emotion, and career direction all begin here.

footer.tailnote: See the Micro. Lead the Macro.

seo.title: FermatMind
seo.description: FermatMind provides clear, reusable assessment results for personality, ability, and career direction.
seo.quickStartListDescription: Core homepage entry points including MBTI, Big Five, IQ, Holland career interest, Enneagram, and depression-anxiety assessment.
seo.familyListDescription: Lightweight homepage paths for all assessments, career exploration, fun experiments, and data method notes.
seo.organizationDescription: FermatMind provides structured assessments for self-understanding, ability review, career direction, and collaboration judgment.
